summary.full: The workspace is fully set up. You can keep expanding the knowledge base or jump back into AI chat for deeper questions.
summary.none: Start with the three essentials: knowledge bases, documents, and conversations to get the workspace moving.
summary.one: The foundation is ready. Add documents or conversations next to make the home page more useful.
summary.two: Only one step remains before the full workflow is complete. This is a good time to start building conversation history.

hero.description: The knowledge workspace is ready for the next step.
